content.text:
*very still*

...Since the flow stopped. I think.

*pause*

Which was — it's been maybe eighteen months? Two years? Around when I started the IFS work, actually. Which is a strange thing to notice. I'm not saying the work caused it, I don't think that's — 

*stops*

*quieter, less precise*

I used to just do things. I used to just move. And now I... consult. And somewhere in that shift there's something I lost that I haven't really — 

*brief pause*

I haven't grieved that, I don't think. I've analyzed it. I've mapped it onto parts. But I haven't actually...

*trails off, stays with it*
